nasb.text: Your harvest’s aftergrowth you shall not reap, and your grapes of untrimmed vines you shall not gather; the land shall have a sabbatical year.

esv.text: You shall not reap what grows of itself in your harvest, or gather the grapes of your undressed vine. It shall be a year of solemn rest for the land.

cnv.text: 你收割以後自然生長的莊稼，你不可收割；沒有修剪的葡萄樹果子，你也不可採摘；這一年，地要完全休歇。

ccb.text: 不可收割自生自长的庄稼，也不可摘未经修剪而结的葡萄。这一年土地要休耕。
